title: Stacks of Mods
description: A large 1.18.2 modpack around technology and decoration. Designed for the Greenfield city map.
body:
### About

This modpack is centered around:

- Technology
- Decoration
- Performance
- Tweaks

It was created for the Greenfield city map.

### Releases

- **Alpha** Preview of next version. Incomplete but works (bug risk).
- **Beta** Works but might contains bugs.
- **Release** Stable release.

### Credits

All credits to the mods authors.

All mods are from Modrinth.

### FAQ

#### There isn't 64 files!

Look at the bottom left corner of the main menu and you'll see `64 mods loaded`. It's a stack.  
If you're using an Alpha version then it's INCOMPLETE.
